Class BaseCounter

java.lang.Object
logic.counters.BaseCounter
Direct Known Subclasses:
ChoppingBoardCounter, Counter, DeepFryer, IceCreamMachine, Mixer, Oven, Pot, ServeCounter, StoveCounter, WaterDispenser
public abstract class BaseCounter extends Object
Abstract base class for all counters.

    The X coordinate for the middle of the box.

    The Y coordinate for the middle of the box.

    width
    The width of the counter.

      width - the width of the counter

      public boolean isWithinBox(ItemSprite item)
      Checks if the given item sprite is within the bounding box.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to check
      Returns:
      true if within box

      Checks if the given coordinates are within the bounding box.
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate
      y - the y coordinate
      Returns:
      true if within box
